use_cases: Displaying logos or partner brands in an auto-scrolling marquee effect
Creating testimonial carousels that loop infinitely
Showcasing product collections in a continuous horizontal scroll
Building hero sections with featured content animations
Displaying skill tags or technology stacks with continuous motion
ai_summary: An infinite horizontal slider component built with Framer Motion that creates smooth, continuous scrolling animations. Features configurable duration, gap spacing, hover state interactions, and optional reverse direction. Ideal for marquee-style content displays like logos, testimonials, or featured products on landing pages and marketing sites.
